positive: A majestic, stylized crescent moon embracing a constellation of blooming exotic flowers, interwoven with graceful, minimalist celestial vines. The composition should be symmetrical, featuring a strong, clean silhouette of the moon and florals against a deep cosmic indigo background. Use vibrant, contrasting jewel tones: sapphire blue, gold, emerald green, and pops of lavender. Style should be elegant, gothic neo-art with a subtle, hand-painted watercolor effect, suitable for direct apparel printing. Emphasize thick, clear outlines and intricate detail suitable for reproduction.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, noisy, grainy, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, ugly, extra limbs, logo, trademark, letter, copyright
